data_source: AI-Estimated (Llama 3.3 70B inference from web context — not official statistics)

exporters.notes: China is a significant producer of copper and has a well-established manufacturing base for copper braids.
Germany has a strong electrical engineering industry and is home to several major copper braid manufacturers.
India has a growing electrical engineering industry and is a significant producer of copper braids.
South Korea has a well-established electronics industry and is a significant producer of copper braids.
Japan has a strong electronics industry and is a significant producer of copper braids.

importers.notes: The US is a significant market for copper braids, driven by demand from the electrical engineering and electronics industries.
Europe is a significant market for copper braids, driven by demand from the electrical engineering and electronics industries.
China is a significant importer of copper braids, driven by demand from the electrical engineering and electronics industries.
Japan is a significant importer of copper braids, driven by demand from the electronics industry.
South Korea is a significant importer of copper braids, driven by demand from the electronics industry.
